description: All new features have i18n translations in EN, BS, and DE
steps: Verify en.json has keys: nav.browseProperties, nav.properties, nav.projects, nav.analytics
Verify en.json has houses section with keys: title, create, edit, notFound, type.*
Verify en.json has charts section with keys: monthlyRevenue, occupancy, projectProgress, revenueByProperty
Verify en.json has dashboard section with keys: active, planned, completed, totalRevenue, pendingActions, viewAll, totalProjects
Verify en.json has priority section with keys: inProgress, planned, completed
Verify en.json has analytics section with keys: title, last30, last90, lastYear, allTime
Verify bs.json has the same keys as en.json with Bosnian translations
Verify de.json has the same keys as en.json with German translations
